授業目的: The purpose of this course is to provide students with the basic knowledge of bilingualism including various views of bilingualism, the measurement of bilingualism, languages in society, the early and later development of bilingualism, bilingualism and cognition, theories of bilingualism, effective schools for bilingual students, bilingualism and bilingual education, etc.
到達目標: By taking this course, students will be able to obtain the basic knowledge of bilingualism including various views of bilingualism, the purpose and methods to measure bilingualism, the status quo of bilingualism, development types of bilingualism, and bilingualism and its cognitive advantages.  They will also be able to understand theories of bilingualism, develop understanding of education that embraces bilingualism and bilingual children, and lastly raise awareness and understanding of the importance of bilingual education.
授業方法: lecture, small group discussion, and class discussion

Each course is positioned within the curriculum in accordance with the diploma policy andcurriculum policy established by each undergraduate/graduate school. By proceeding with the study of this course with an awareness of the DP and CP, the following abilities expected by each undergraduate/graduate school will be developed.Global Studies:1. Understanding and analytical skills regarding international issues: the ability to understand and analyze various regions of the world from different perspectives in the humanities and social sciences.2. Problem-solving skills: the ability to proactively identify problems and solve them based on appropriate methods.3. Intercultural understanding and multicultural coexistence: the ability to be sensitive to different cultures and to coexist with diverse cultures.
